title: [Catalog][Product][Configuration] Add default option support

exploratory.charter: Feature charter — default-option preselection at integration boundaries

notes: CFG-030 Aluminum/Carbon divergence during the run was a transient concurrent-restore race (backend agent restored Carbon mid-run); post-run authoritative read confirms Carbon isDefault=true at BOTH REST and storefront xAPI. No platform defect; frontend Defect 1 retracted.

Tooling follow-up: seed-default-option-cfg.mjs cannot reliably land a default on a non-first-stored option (server normalizes to first-stored on re-POST). Recommend the seeder create option products in desired-default-first order. Required a manual Admin-UI Save to set Carbon.

Test-asset correction: CFG-CA-029 expected-result wording 'option A (first submitted) wins' is inaccurate; normalization is 'first STORED option wins' (by stored option order). Invariant (one default, HTTP 200, no 422) holds.
PROPOSED-BL-CAT-006a (one default per section; storefront preselects it) pending qa-lead promotion.
Pre-existing CFG_BIKE alias storefront URL/slug 404 on /configurations/ path (GUID correct) — unrelated to VCST-4715.
Risk: config radio <input> is visually hidden; worth a keyboard/a11y check on the radiogroup (real users unaffected).
